results.title: Search Tour

bugs.title: Website inaccessible: HTTP ERROR 406
bugs.description: The automated test "Search Tour" could not be executed because the target URL https://guidetoiceland.is returned an HTTP ERROR 406. This error prevents access to the website, making it impossible to perform any test steps.
bugs.expected: The website https://guidetoiceland.is should load successfully, allowing the automated test to proceed.
bugs.actual: The website https://guidetoiceland.is returned an HTTP ERROR 406, making it inaccessible.

assertions.evidence: Website is inaccessible (HTTP ERROR 406) preventing test execution.

results.agentOutput: The website `https://guidetoiceland.is` is inaccessible due to an HTTP ERROR 406, preventing the execution of the "Search Tour" automated test. I have recorded a critical bug for this issue.
results.validationOutput:
The website `https://guidetoiceland.is` is currently returning an HTTP ERROR 406. I am unable to access the page and therefore cannot proceed with the automated test. The task cannot be completed due to the website being inaccessible.

I have recorded an assertion to reflect this critical failure. Since the website is down, I cannot proceed with any of the requested test steps.
